message: Operation 'createTask' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, unclear_purpose, not_actionable. Original summary is ambiguous about the dual behavior. Description mentions upsert but lacks clarity on the decision logic and return value. Enhanced version explicitly explains the upsert condition, expected input schema, and response to improve AI agent interpretability of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Create a new task or update existing task (upsert behavior based on unique ID)
data.summary_suggestion: Create or update task in workflow
data.description_suggestion: Create a new task or update an existing task using upsert behavior. If a task with the provided unique ID exists, it will be updated; otherwise, a new task is created. Accepts TaskRequest schema with task details. Returns the created or updated task object with assigned ID and metadata.
data.reasoning: Original summary is ambiguous about the dual behavior. Description mentions upsert but lacks clarity on the decision logic and return value. Enhanced version explicitly explains the upsert condition, expected input schema, and response to improve AI agent interpretability of when and how to use this operation.
